source: Hand-curated from widely-known public web structure (Common Crawl host webgraph reality). Authority ordering reflects well-established relative domain authority (Ahrefs/Moz DR consensus tiers as of 2024-2025). Referring-domain samples list domains that, by their nature, demonstrably link to the target (official ecosystem/registry/reference sites). Recall is measured with a floor (not 1.0) because the sovereign webgraph is a Common Crawl sample, not an exhaustive index.
notes: Used by backlinks.accuracy.test.ts. Authority ordering is the primary monotonicity check; referring-domain recall is a secondary floor check on high-confidence inbound links.
